        "A": "5, ['Specific street addresses for properties (e.g., 2149 Kingsridge Drive, 97 Marine Drive) — no address field in template', 'Mentions of nearby schools and school district quality — no field for education or school proximity', 'Lot dimensions (e.g., 40 ft × 100 ft) — no field for lot size or frontage/depth', 'Loan-to-Value ratio and estimated monthly payment — not represented in financing_options', 'Land Transfer Tax and miscellaneous government fees — not represented in template fields']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "16, ['Property listings including type (detached_house), bedrooms, bathrooms, price, condition_rating, and location_region', 'Property features such as double garage, patio, fenced backyard, energy-efficient windows', 'Availability and move-in ready status', 'Viewing coordination request (would you like to arrange viewing or virtual tour)', 'Financing options with down payment, interest rate, term, and documentation_required', 'Purchase method (mortgage)', 'Legal service package with cost and service_level (premium)', 'Survey/inspection fees and title insurance costs under financing_options', 'Processing and closing costs under total_package_summary', 'Suggestion to include legal and survey packages (service_coordination)', 'Service_packages for moving and utilities coordination', 'Moving service options (basic/standard/premium) with cost and included features', 'Scheduling flexibility and insurance coverage in moving packages', 'Coordination of move-in date and timeline', 'Request to confirm selection of moving package (confirmation_tracking)', 'Currency (CAD) consistently represented in pricing fields']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Specific street addresses for properties (e.g., 2149 Kingsridge Drive, 97 Marine Drive) — no address field in template', 'Mentions of nearby schools and school district quality — no field for education or school proximity', 'Lot dimensions (e.g., 40 ft × 100 ft) — no field for lot size or frontage/depth', 'Loan-to-Value ratio and estimated monthly payment — not represented in financing_options', 'Land Transfer Tax and miscellaneous government fees — not represented in template fields']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
